violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - Areas of paint that seals the wood is chipping off from shelves in walk-in cooler. Needs spot painting to keep sealed.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Both doors for walk-in cooler in need of repair. Handles do not latch properly.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Blizzard mixing machine in need of cleaning. Buildup collecting where cup meets machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Fans in walk-in cooler in need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls in storage area behind kitchen in need of cleaning from dust buildup. - Several ceiling tiles in kitchen in need of cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Several ceiling tiles in kitchen are sagging and in need of repair or replacing.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
